---
title: "A Short Demo"
author: "Jane Doe"
date: "2026-04-24"
output: html_document
---

# Introduction

We use the `mgcv` package for generalized additive models $f(x) = \beta_0 + s(x)$.

```{r setup, echo=FALSE}
library("mgcv")
data("mcycle", package = "MASS")
```

# Analysis

The model fit, computed via `r format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M")`, is shown below.

```{r fit}
m <- gam(accel ~ s(times), data = mcycle)
summary(m)
```

# Conclusion

The results match the reference.
